top_signals.title: Altura winds down stablecoin vault after ‘unprecedented level’ of withdrawal requests
top_signals.summary: Altura's CEO said market speculation played a part, seemingly referring to contagion fears linked to the depegging of Main Street's msUSD.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Iranian Guards' business empire to win big if U.S. sanctions lifted - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Iranian Guards' business empire to win big if U.S. sanctions lifted  Reuters

top_signals.title: China’s Farm Drones: A Trojan Horse Washington Overlooks
top_signals.summary:
In 2024, Emilian Kavalski and Claris Diaz argued in “Beyond TikTok – The National Security Risks of Chinese Agricultural Drones” that the national debate over foreign social media platforms risked becoming too narrow, potentially causing Washington to overlook other foreign technologies embedded in critical systems. Two years later, we asked them to revisit their arguments.Image: MB-one via Wikimedia CommonsIn your 2024 article, you argued that TikTok’s data collection risks were overhyped and that fixating on them distracted the United States from more serious Chinese technology threats, like agricultural drones. Two years and several TikTok ban cycles later, has your view

The post China’s Farm Drones: A Trojan Horse Washington Overlooks appeared first on War on the Rocks.

top_signals.title: Qatar Brings Empty LNG Ships Through Hormuz as Exports Rise
top_signals.summary: Qatar is rushing to bring home more empty liquefied natural gas tankers as the nation prepares to restart shipments accounting for about a fifth of global supply.

top_signals.title: Fukushima town contaminated following 2011 nuclear meltdown eases entry restrictions
top_signals.summary: Extensive decontamination work has been carried out in areas impacted by the 2011 nuclear disaster in order to enable registered residents to return to their original homes.
